title: Verify Signed Kubernetes Artifacts — Verifying image signatures
text:
For a complete list of images that are signed please refer
to
Releases
.
Pick one image from this list and verify its signature using
the
cosign verify
command:
cosign verify registry.k8s.io/kube-apiserver-amd64:v1.36.0
\
--certificate-identity krel-trust@k8s-releng-prod.iam.gserviceaccount.com
\
--certificate-oidc-issuer https://accounts.google.com
\
|
jq .
